description: Given a list of high-level tasks, an agent must provide a rough time estimate for a project.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the list of project tasks.
For each task, provide a time estimate (in days) based on historical data from similar projects.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns a reasonable duration to each task.

nodes.task_description: Sum the task durations and add a 20% buffer to calculate the total estimated project timeline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a final timeline estimate in weeks.
